subject: Fw: Andrew Farkas/David Dowling
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> 
Sent: Thursday, November 23, 2006 10:15 AM
Subject: Re: Andrew Farkas/David Dowling
 


have andrew call me 505 ███ █████


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, November 23, 2006 7:39:32 AM
Subject: Andrew Farkas/David Dowling


Hey Cecelia,
Andrew wanted me to touch base with you and invite Jeffery to meet him at the yacht haven grande site, in St. Thomas, tomorrow (Friday) at 1:00 pm. Andrew will be landing around 12:30 and will be at the site at 1:00pm. Can I tell Andrew that Jeffery can make the meeting? 
Thx,
David
646-█████████
--------------------------
Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Device
--------------------------------------------------------
